holdings.infoBox: IYK is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Procter & Gamble Company stock at 13.60%, The Coca-Cola Company at 12.20%, Philip Morris International at 11.06%, PepsiCo at 7.89%, and CVS Health at 5.08%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Consumer Staples ETF (IYK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of stocks in the US consumer goods sector. IYK was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Russell 1000 Consumer Staples RIC 22.5/45 Capped Index
